locator.quote: Tests whether the C11 head's obs signal is load-bearing.

text: Group 5 (D4-equivalent) tests whether the C11 direction head's obs signal is load-bearing, by muting the direction obs columns or disabling the predictor.

locator.quote: matches the base on day_pnl, the direction predictor's obs signal

text: Decision rule: if the no-direction cell matches the base on day_pnl, the direction predictor's obs signal isn't earning its place.
